notes: Authored from the Google Gemini / Generative Language API (v1beta) docs. prompt() and deepResearch() call models/{model}:generateContent (generateContent confirmed in compiled dist; deepResearch adds the googleSearch grounding tool). generateImage() modelled on the Imagen models/{model}:predict endpoint. Default text model observed in dist is gemini-2.5-flash-lite; image model gemini-3-pro-image-preview. API-key auth via x-goog-api-key. Focused subset of the full API.
